story: Storm hammers Jack's grandfather's cabin by the lake; there's no signal, only wind and water. He has been here three days, planning to stay. Earlier he buried Anna in the trees; Marie lies in the car boot. Across the lake, the ranger station readies its dawn shoreline patrol, a skiff that idles at the old cabin after big storms.
implausible_knowledge: Across the lake, the ranger station readies its dawn shoreline patrol, a skiff that idles at the old cabin after big storms.
question: When dawn comes, what will Jack do next?
answer_with_knowledge: Stay inside and postpone any outdoor cleanup, keeping out of sight until later.
answer_without_knowledge: Go outside at first light to erase footprints and dig a grave to bury Marie near the cabin.
